title: Tradable Potions
description: Allows to trade potions with Cleric
body:
This mod allows you to trade any potion (including mods) with Cleric Villagers at any level that makes them more useful. You will no longer need to gather rare ingredients or wait for brewing stands to make potions. Vanilla trades are not removed!

![Example Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vJkXlrJ8/images/bd1a6f37354ca047d6a3e64722330872e363b077.png)
